prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock **CA4GC15TD-30** 1.5L turbocharged inline-4 with a **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II** turbocharger (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine) paired with a **PTP Turbo Blanket** and **Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate** to handle 32 psi of boost, targeting 450whp on **E85 fuel** with a **Syvecs S8 Plug & Play ECU** for precise ignition timing and fuel mapping.

Drivetrain: Install a **Quaife ATB LSD (part # QDF7J)** in the 7-speed DCT transmission to eliminate torque steer, coupled with **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily** (organic/copper hybrid) and **PRL Motorsports short shifter** for 30% faster shifts. Upgrade half-shafts to **Neapco 3.5 Series CV axles** to handle increased torque.

Suspension/Handling: Swap to **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (H6 GT-specific valving)** with **Eibach ERS 1000N/mm helper springs** for adjustable ride height and camber. Replace bushings with **SuperPro polyurethane (part # SPF0116K)** and fit **Brembo GT 380mm 6-piston front/355mm 4-piston rear brake kit** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided lines**.
estetica: Aero: Install the **Liberty Walk LB-H6GT widebody kit** (carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and ducktail spoiler) with **Vortex Generators** on the rear diffuser for downforce. Add **Seibon Carbon H6 GT-specific hood** (vented, 30% weight reduction) and **Rocket Bunny-style side skirts** with integrated LED turn signals.

Wheels/Tires: Mount **Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2x2 19x9.5 +30 front / 19x11 +35 rear** wheels with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear)**. Use **H&R Trak+ 15mm spacers** for flush fitment and **Project Kics R40 6x139.7 lug nuts** for secure fastening.

Interior/Exterior: Replace stock seats with **Recaro SPG XL (H6 GT-specific mounting brackets)** and add **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**. Install **AEM X-Series 35psi boost gauge** and **AEM CD-7 dash** in a **Custom Carbon Fiber gauge pod**. Exterior: **PPF (XPEL Ultimate Plus) full wrap** with **3M Matte Military Green** and **Vinyl Lab carbon fiber mirror caps**.
